text:
And there are many really good AI components at Google: they have top-flight image, music, & video generation, and good UIs for each of them.

Google AI studio is probably the best playground for AI experimentation. NotebookLM still has no equivalent product from other labs, etc.

I am not convinced that we should be comfortable calling "problem solving" or "judgement" or whatever as skills that are impossible for AI to do well. Like any other skill, there are humans who are really good at it, but that doesn't mean that AIs don't do good judgement, etc.

To be clear - I think the vast majority of doctors are great. 

But most don't feel good about the amount of time they get to spend with patients + how long it takes them to get appointments.

I hope AI can make doctor < -- > patient time more effective + efficient!
RT @DavidAriew: I see a lot of artists building their identity around AI hate, and it’s gaining them some clout and engagement, but through…
